note: Lightweight outcomes layer, v1 (July 2026). Each outcome names an end-state and the gaps that block it, defined by whole domains plus named cross-domain gaps. Method kin: Deep Science Ventures' Outcomes Graph and Discourse Graphs. v2 adds per-gap curation and dependency logic.

outcomes.title: Communities can own and run local assets and services
outcomes.line: The pub, the shop, the hall and the services around them can pass into community hands and stay there.

outcomes.title: Every young person has a visible route in
outcomes.line: Nobody drops off the radar at 16, and work, skills and participation are findable from any postcode.

outcomes.title: Public money is traceable and contestable
outcomes.line: Spending, contracts and influence can be followed by anyone, and misuse has consequences.

outcomes.title: People control their own data and identity
outcomes.line: Records, identifiers and communications answer to the people they describe.

outcomes.title: Britain can run its critical digital infrastructure at home
outcomes.line: The software, compute and models the country depends on do not sit solely in someone else's jurisdiction.

outcomes.title: The debt is understood, and the unborn are not billed silently
outcomes.line: What is owed, what servicing costs, and who pays are plain public knowledge shaping every fiscal choice.

outcomes.title: Neighbourhoods stay functional when systems fail
outcomes.line: When the mast, the grid or the supply chain breaks, the street has a practised fallback.

outcomes.title: Health, care and prevention work close to home
outcomes.line: The years of healthy life you get stop depending on the borough you were born in.

outcomes.title: Justice is reachable when rights are breached
outcomes.line: A right you cannot enforce is not narrowed quietly into a privilege.

outcomes.title: Local economies grow and local government can act
outcomes.line: Councils and regions hold the tools, data and revenue to fix what is in front of them.

outcomes.title: The AI transition is prepared for, not suffered
outcomes.line: Displacement, assurance and capability questions get answered before they harden into crises.
